President Donald Trump holds his 9th cabinet meeting at the White House.

byWarren Tennyson

LAS VEGAS (KSNV) —One of our locals Alexis Lagan from Boulder City just touched down inParistoday.

Lagan is once again shooting for gold. She competed on the U.S. Shooting team back in 2021 at the Tokyo Olympics.

She took to social media to show off the athlete welcome experience and also show off all her fun new gear for this year's games.

She'll be representing the United States in the air pistol events.

We can't wait to cheer her and  all the other amazing athletes on for their quest for gold.

2025Sinclair, Inc.
title: Boulder City local on Olympic  team is ready to take a shot at the gold
